---
name: Propose a New Skill
about: Suggest a new AI agent skill to be added to this repository.
title: 'Skill Proposal: [Skill Name]'
labels: 'new skill'
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Proposal Details

### 1. Skill Name
What should the skill folder/frontmatter name be? (e.g. `react-performance`, `docker-deployment`)
* *Answer here*

### 2. Goal & Purpose
What problem does this skill solve? When should an AI agent trigger it?
* *Answer here*

### 3. Triggers & Scenarios
List specific words, phrases, or conditions that should cause an agent to automatically activate this skill:
* *e.g., when the user mentions "Dockerfile", "production container", "multi-stage build", "slow container"*
* *Answer here*

### 4. Key Rules & Instructions
What are the most critical rules or guidelines the agent must follow for this task?
* *e.g., "Always use multi-stage builds to keep production images tiny."*
* *e.g., "Never run containers as root to prevent host privilege escalation."*
* *Answer here*

### 5. Potential Resources (Optional)
Are there supporting configuration files, checklists, or reference materials that should be in the `resources/` folder?
* *e.g., standard secure Dockerfile template, list of non-root user setups*
* *Answer here*

---

> [!TIP]
> Did you know? You can write and bootstrap skills yourself very quickly using the **[Anthropic Skill Creator](https://github.com/anthropics/skills/tree/main/skills/skill-creator)**. If you'd like to try building it, check out our [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/Vishuvishu/ai-skills/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)!
